reviews.comment:
Usamos varios de esa estación de servicio, baños limpios, atención del personal correcta y cordial, cafetería a un precio moderado pero podría se mas y el lavadero de autos dejan el vehículo en buenas condiciones. Mejoraría la cafetería y el servicio de WIFI Free . Recomendable, en un punto estratégico de la ciudad Guaymallen

(Translated by Google)
We used this gas station several times. The restrooms were clean, the staff was friendly and helpful. The cafeteria was reasonably priced, but could be better. The car wash left the vehicle in good condition. I would improve the cafeteria and the free Wi-Fi. Highly recommended. Located in a strategic location in the city of Guaymallen.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10539008023529743134/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZLTRYWUpnEAE
